name: io.github.tedorigawa001/servicenow-mcp
title: ServiceNow MCP Server
description: 400+ ServiceNow tools across all modules — ITSM, CMDB, HRSD, CSM, SecOps, and more.

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client ID from ServiceNow Application Registry

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client secret from ServiceNow Application Registry

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_OAUTH_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: ServiceNow username — only for password grant (omit to use client_credentials grant)

environmentVariables.name: SERVICENOW_OAUTH_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: ServiceNow password — only for password grant (omit to use client_credentials grant)

environmentVariables.name: CMDB_WRITE_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable CMDB write operations (true/false, default: false)

environmentVariables.name: NOW_ASSIST_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable Now Assist AI features (true/false, default: false)

environmentVariables.name: ATF_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Enable ATF test execution (true/false, default: false)

environmentVariables.name: MCP_TOOL_PACKAGE
environmentVariables.description: Role-based tool package: full, service_desk, platform_developer, etc.
